hook: Effort feels different when it is welcomed rather than extracted.
body: The same action can feel generous in a mutual bond and draining in an imbalanced one.

hook: Men often keep doing more because they hope enough effort will finally make the dynamic feel mutual.
body: Do not just ask whether you can give more. Ask whether your effort is being met with enough care to stay healthy.

hook: Do not just ask whether you can give more. Ask whether your effort is being met with enough care to stay healthy.
body: Planning thoughtful dates can feel energizing when interest is reciprocal and exhausting when the other person mostly consumes the effort.
